title: Marketplace Manager - Mothercare India - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Mothercare India - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Mothercare India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Tiruchirappalli-based team.

About Mothercare India:
Mothercare India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mothercare India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
